taxClasses.name: Not married, no children
taxClasses.description: Single, divorced, or widowed without children

taxClasses.name: Married (higher income than partner)
taxClasses.description: Married with significant income difference (favorable for higher earner)

taxClasses.name: Married (equal income earner)
taxClasses.description: Married couple with similar incomes (standard class)

taxClasses.name: Married (lower income than partner)
taxClasses.description: Married with significant income difference (less favorable)

healthInsuranceTypes.name: Private (without employer contribution)
healthInsuranceTypes.note: Private insurance is not deducted from salary, but paid separately

healthInsuranceTypes.name: Private (with employer contribution)
healthInsuranceTypes.note: Private insurance is not deducted from salary, but paid separately (employer pays their share separately)

solidaritySurcharge.note: Applied to income tax amount. Most taxpayers don't pay (only high income earners)
